creatives.niche_raw: pentesters, geeks, hardware hackers, open-source enthusiasts, makers who want to explore digital systems
creatives.angle_raw: a toy-like body that hides serious hacker hardware — carries a personality (cyber-dolphin) and signals membership in the hacker scene

claims: portable multi-tool for pentesters and geeks in a toy-like body
fully open-source and customizable, so you can extend it in whatever way you like
mechanism: GPIO pins 3.3V logic levels (5V tolerant for input)
MicroSD card for apps and data

claims: Explore any kind of access control system, RFID, radio protocols, and debug hardware using GPIO pins
problem_um_raw: The idea of Flipper Zero is to combine all the hardware tools you'd need for exploration and development on the go

claims: It can interact with digital systems in real life and grow while you use it

notes: Flipper Zero leads with the multi-tool hardware breadth as the pitch — NOT a single transformation promise. The dolphin personality / 'toy-like body' frames the serious hardware in a playful collector-object angle. Active Facebook ads: 48 current, 117 total structured ads in ads/flipper-zero.json.
